name: dsgvo
description: German digital-law compliance for websites: scan a site, review your Datenschutzerklärung, check cookie consent and Impressum, and classify AI systems under the AI Act — grounded in DSGVO, BDSG, TDDDG, DDG and KI-VO. Legal citations are pulled live from the dsgvo.pro MCP, so paragraphs are real, not invented.
